steps.title: Identify what needs explanation
steps.content: Both ship-only and ship+sonic-pulse exposures decreased dives similarly — the differences between the two exposures were negligible. The blank explains why adding sonic pulses didn't change much.

steps.title: Match to a choice
steps.content:
Choice B: ship sounds dominate the soundscape, so adding sonic pulses barely changes the auditory environment — explaining the negligible difference. A says sonic pulses travel deeper (would predict a difference); C describes a difference (contradicts "negligible"); D dismisses the whole effect, but both conditions still affected diving.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
